items.name: Swicy Ramen
items.description: Sweet meets spicy! Thick noodles in a savoury pork broth with the perfect balance of sweet and spicy, topped with seasoned ground pork, sweet corn, bean sprouts, cilantro, chili oil, a seasoned egg, shredded chili pepper, and inari tofu.
items.simplified_description: Thick noodles in sweet and spicy pork broth with pork, egg, corn, and chili toppings.

items.name: Golden Sesame Ramen
items.description: Thick noodles in a rich pork broth blended with creamy white sesame paste. Topped with seasoned ground pork, marinated egg, spinach, bean sprouts, scallions, chili oil, shredded chili pepper, white pepper, and fried onion.
items.simplified_description: Thick noodles in pork broth with sesame, pork, egg, spinach, and spicy chili oil.

items.name: Seasonal Combo
items.description: Swicy Ramen or Golden Sesame Ramen + 1 Gyoza or Tokyo Fries + 1 Coca-Cola® Beverage (355ml)
items.simplified_description: Combo with choice of ramen, gyoza or fries, and a Coca-Cola beverage.

items.name: Hot Yuzu Honey Tea
items.description: warm yuzu and honey with a hint of lemon
items.simplified_description: Warm tea with yuzu, honey, and lemon flavor.

items.name: Sparkling Yuzu Lemonade
items.description: fizzy citrus with a minty zest
items.simplified_description: Fizzy citrus lemonade with a refreshing mint flavor.

items.name: Shandy Gaff
items.description: A refreshing blend of Sapporo beer and ginger ale, brightened with a fresh mint garnish
items.simplified_description: Beer and ginger ale mix with fresh mint garnish.

items.name: Sapporo Black
items.description: Bold, flavourful dark lager with roasted malts and coffee-chocolate notes
items.simplified_description: Dark lager beer with roasted malt and coffee-chocolate flavors.

items.name: Value Meal
items.description: 1 Value Original Ramen (Pork / Veggie / Chicken / Beef +$1) + 1 Gyoza (Pork or Veggie) + 1 Coca-Cola® Beverage (355mL)
items.simplified_description: Meal with ramen, gyoza, and Coca-Cola beverage.

items.name: Beer/Sake Combo
items.description: 1 Ramen* + 1 Sapporo Draft (16 oz) or 1 House Sake (5 oz)
items.simplified_description: Combo of ramen with either draft beer or house sake.

items.name: Meal For One
items.description: 1 Ramen* + 1 Gyoza or Tokyo Fries + 1 Coca-Cola® Beverage (355mL)
items.simplified_description: Single meal with ramen, gyoza or fries, and a Coca-Cola beverage.

items.name: Meal for Two
items.description: 2 Ramen* + 1 Gyoza or Tokyo Fries + 2 Coca-Cola® Beverages (355mL)
items.simplified_description: Meal for two with ramen, gyoza or fries, and Coca-Cola beverages.

items.name: Meal for Four
items.description: 4 Ramen* + 1 Gyoza + 1 Tokyo Fries or Edamame + 4 Coca-Cola® Beverages (355mL)
items.simplified_description: Meal for four with ramen, gyoza, fries or edamame, and Coca-Cola beverages.

items.name: Pork Original Ramen
items.description: A timeless classic with our rich, creamy, umami-packed broth and tender slices of pork that melt in your mouth.
items.simplified_description: Rich creamy pork broth ramen with tender pork slices.

items.name: Pork Shoyu Ramen
items.description: Savoury soy sauce broth paired with perfectly tender pork and red ginger.
items.simplified_description: Soy sauce broth ramen with tender pork and red ginger.
